assertions.description: The autocorrect global HTML attribute is reflected on HTMLElement — required for the editor surface in the uber-demo.
Autocorrect defaults to true on freshly-created form controls — the uber-demo's editor opts out explicitly to keep voice-driven code intact.
SpeechRecognition is exposed — the voice-input surface of the demo.
SpeechRecognition.prototype exposes unspokenPunctuation — lets the editor receive punctuation without spoken commands.
AudioContext accepts a renderSizeHint — the audio feedback path in the demo uses a small quantum for low latency.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const Ctx=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext;if(!Ctx)return false;let c;try{c=new Ctx({renderSizeHint:128});}catch(e){return false;}const ok=c.renderQuantumSize===128;try{await c.close();}catch(_){};return ok;})()

assertions.description: contenteditable is supported on HTMLElement — the editor scratchpad host.
